title: Sour Crumbly Pickles Crock
description: A lazy Sunday Australian dish featuring a sour and crumbly pickle spread with bhuna spices, low-fat-friendly for a refreshing snack.

ingredients.name: Bhuna Spices (mixed)
ingredients.notes: Including green chili and mustard seeds, optional for spicier

instructions: In a mixing bowl, finely dice the pickles.
Add Bhuna spices and mix well.
Gradually add Low-Fat Mayonnaise while stirring continuously until combined.
Mix in lemon juice to achieve desired sourness.
Season with salt if necessary. Adjust spices for personal preference.
Serve immediately or store in an airtight container.
Enjoy as a snack or spread on toast.
